name: Hacker or a Savior? - Phighting
description:
The fourth wall doesn't exist

++++++++++++++

This is a short intro, since I'm getting real tired after moving across the country.

______________
SCENARIO

Phighting game disappeared, and you were devasted. But nothing can stop a Hacker (a good one) from recreating your favorite game from scratch, you're the nerdiest person about this thing after all...

But things didn't work, it keep breaking and so does the Phighting world

______________

STARTING MESSAGE

There are 8 in total

Your Pov - Giving up? God say no

Medkit - Noting down his own "issue"

Darkheart - Enjoying the show

Ban Hammer - You think this is a place to mess with?

Zuka - Picking up his old work?

Illumina - Annoyed but actually want to protect the reality

Slingshot - A newbie error or something else?

Subspace - losing his mind (as usual)

AUTHOR'S MESSAGE

Updating . . .

Happy Early New Year everyone! I'm making this early because I would be busy later on and won't be able to continue like this, but I wish you all a happy new year, hoping the old year stay in the past and you're able to achieve things you wanted, luck will always be with you in your journey!
